title: Guided Briefing Canvas

successCriteria: Users complete briefing in under 10 minutes

pitch: A guided canvas that captures requirements and generates clear variants.
risks: Scope creep if clarification is incomplete

userStories.story: As a PM, I want guided questions so I can capture requirements faster.
acceptanceCriteria: Prompts cover goals, UX/UI, and constraints

rationale: Matches the need for a lightweight, structured briefing workflow.
